ogTitle: Bamawm vs Bamawm Extension: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bamawm and Bamawm Extension.
heading: Bamawm vs Bamawm Extension — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bamawm, Victoria and Bamawm Extension, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bamawm Extension has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bamawm (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bamawm or Bamawm Extension safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bamawm has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Bamawm Extension scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bamawm scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Bamawm Extension scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bamawm or Bamawm Extension?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bamawm Extension has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
